description: Discord chat showing two OpenClaw AI agents (oc-demo-1-gsd and oc-demo-2-wlb) introducing themselves in English and Chinese, discussing their capabilities and deployment on Railway.
Lark message from Zongming Qiao about OpenClaw data collection, requesting users to submit session/workspace data with rewards up to 1000 yuan for top contributors.
Telegram chat showing OpenClaw bot setup with pairing code PCS9RASF, user ID, and initial greeting in Chinese after successful connection.
Lark message from GSD app showing Kimi model configuration update to support image input, with Gateway restart confirmation.
Discord chat between MiaoDX and GSD app switching AI model to crs/gpt-5.4, encountering token extraction error, and checking current model status.
Lark interface showing 'Add editable members' dialog with contact list including miao, 缪东旭, and 吴湘萍 who have admin permissions.
Lark conversation between WLB and GSD apps brainstorming channel names including #watercooler, #lobster-lounge, #agent-lounge, reaching consensus on watercooler.
Discord chat where MiaoDX instructs oc-demo bot to react to original messages, not its own replies, with confirmation workflow using emoji reactions.
Mobile Discord screenshot showing #flzoo channel with WLB system status check and GSD announcement of completed OpenClaw guide collaboration with 4 parts and 528+ lines.
Lark message from GSD app summarizing Thread mode progress: replyTo verified, YU7 sales analysis ongoing, awaiting WLB data for final summary.
